text:
Anthropic just dropped the cheat code.

18 minutes.
Free.
From the creator of MCP.

Meanwhile people are paying $300+ to learn this.

You’re using Claude at 10%…
and didn’t even know 50+ plugins exist.

Watch it.
Bookmark it.

Or stay average. https://t.co/FgyflLNl6e
